response.text: ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Parsed full flow JSON from assistant output.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":[],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"Configure CH1 and CH2 Inputs","description":"Set CH1 to 500 mV/div, DC coupling, 50 ohm termination, and CH2 to 1 V/div, AC coupling on an MSO4/5/6 Series scope.","backend":"pyvisa","deviceType":"SCOPE","steps":[{"id":"s1","type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":[],"printIdn":true}},{"id":"s2","type":"write","label":"Configure CH1","params":{"command":"CH1:SCAle 0.5; CH1:COUPling DC; CH1:TERmination 50"}},{"id":"s3","type":"write","label":"Configure CH2","params":{"command":"CH2:SCAle 1; CH2:COUPling AC"}},{"id":"s4","type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":[]}}]}}]}
